name: tapu-fini
flavor_texts: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.
The guardian deity of Poni, it can control water. People say it can create pure water that will wash away any uncleanness.
This guardian deity of Poni Island manipulates water. Because it lives deep within a thick fog, it came to be both feared and revered.
Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.
text: Tapu-fini is the Land Spirit Pokémon. It is a water and fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: misty-surge, telepathy (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 75, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 95, Sp. Def: 130, Speed: 85. Evolution line: tapu-fini. Lore: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy. The guardian deity of Poni, it can control water. People say it can create pure water that will wash away any uncleanness. This guardian deity of Poni Island manipulates water. Because it lives deep within a thick fog, it came to be both feared and revered. Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.
